title: SELECT FROM REMOTE TABLE WHERE IS NOT NULL produces wrong result
poc: SELECT * FROM t WHERE i IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT FROM REMOTE TABLE WHERE IS NOT NULL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE remote_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO remote_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
SELECT * FROM remote_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM remote_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND value > 15;
